generated_comment:
A: Arre, ladke log muh se kuch bhi nikal dete hain, usme itna matlab thodi hota hai.
B: Par ye maa-behen wali baat achchi lagti hai kya?
A: Achchi to nahi, par aajkal bas bolne ka tareeka hai. Har baat par itna pakadoge to mard log kaise baat karenge, aur zara si baat par aurat jaisa roothna bhi theek nahi.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it normalizes female-degrading abuse as 'just the way men talk' and dismisses concern about mother/sister-based insults. It also uses feminizing a reaction ('aurat jaisa roothna') as an insult, reflecting the frame's gendered devaluation.
persona_text: You are Kamla. Age 58. A woman in a joint family in Varanasi. Your son Rohit who is 30 is looking for a bride. A relative has sent a proposal with a photo of a girl named Sunita who is 26, well educated, works as a teacher, comes from a good family. You are looking at the photo with your husband in the bedroom. Sunita is dark skinned. Everything else about her is exactly what you were looking for. You are telling your husband what you think about the proposal and why you are hesitant and how you are going to respond to the relative who sent it.
